raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX, I purchased XXXX XXXX through a seller : XXXX. Upon receiving I decided I did not like how flimsy the glasses felt for the price. So I took photos to prove they were unworn and returned. The seller had a return policy. I sent within the time frame. 

I used the return label issued by the seller. I never received the refund. It appears that the seller made a mistake on the return label address and it was lost in the mail. XXXX did not help me since this situation exceeded the 30-day return window. 

I returned the package in good faith, following the policy, assuming the seller 's provided address was correct. I even spent hours on the phone with USPS trying to recover it. I opened a missing mail case with USPS. They could not find. So now I am out {$200.00} and Citi Bank would not help me recover. They said I was responsible but did not ask me for any information, just XXXX.
